description_long: This is an old, weathered station wagon sedan with a boxy body style and a faded, dirty exterior. The paint is predominantly a dull, off-white with significant rust and grime, especially along the lower panels and roof. The windows are dark and appear to be heavily tinted or dirty, with the rear window partially open or missing. The vehicle features a roof rack, classic chrome bumpers, and rectangular headlights, all showing signs of age and corrosion. The wheels are simple, steel rims with visible wear and dirt. The overall condition suggests long-term exposure to the elements and lack of maintenance, making it suitable for post-apocalyptic or abandoned urban environments.
description: A weathered, boxy station wagon sedan with faded off-white paint, rust, and grime, featuring a roof rack and simple steel wheels. The car appears old, dirty, and neglected, with dark windows and visible corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular grille, dual headlights, and a heavily rusted hood with a roof rack visible on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long, boxy profile, four doors, roof rack, and significant rust along the lower panels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tailgate, missing or open rear window, and rusted bumper, with taillights barely visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same boxy shape, four doors, and extensive weathering.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple steel wheels with a solid center and no visible spokes, covered in dirt and rust.
